caption: A man with long dark hair pulled back and wearing glasses performs in front of a backdrop of brown blinds. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt under a dark vest adorned with blue embroidery along the edges and a red and white patterned accessory hanging from his neck. He stands behind a microphone on a black stand, positioned as if singing or speaking, while holding an acoustic guitar that is partially visible at the bottom of the frame. The text "ORCA" appears in white capital letters on the right side of the screen. Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a stationary position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression while continuing his performance. The lighting and background remain consistent throughout the clip.
